summary: This document is a medical assessment report generated by Teckel Medical SL for a patient presenting with respiratory symptoms like a runny nose and cough. It outlines potential diagnoses, self-care recommendations, and legal disclaimers regarding data protection and medical advice. As a competitor output found in research files, it illustrates the functionality of similar AI-driven triage tools in the health-tech sector.
